title: iris orientalis var. gigantea
intro: Iris orientalis var. gigantea, also known as the giant blue flag or giant blue iris, is a perennial plant species belonging to the iris family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In traditional medicine, Iris orientalis var. gigantea is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
